message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from friday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:45 and should depart from norwich
The train should go to cambridge and should be on the same day as the hotel booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
